formPrivacy: No spam. One call, no commitment. We review your situation before we talk.
thankYouMessage: You're booked. Check your email for a calendar confirmation. Before we talk, we'll review your website, your ICP, and any public information about your market so we can use the call on strategy, not introductions.
footerTagline: Outsourced sales infrastructure for B2B founders.
blogIntro: Practical thinking on building sales functions that work without the founder in every deal.
heroTrustClaims: Full sales playbook built in week one
First qualified meetings typically in week two or three
riskReversalLine: Most clients see their first qualified meeting within 30 days. If month two ends without a single meeting booked, we extend at no cost until we hit the target.
heroH1Format: [Audience] get [specific outcome] in [timeframe] -- or we keep working until they do.

founderSupportingCards.title: Industries Served
founderSupportingCards.body_template: {owner_first} and the team have built sales systems for clients in SaaS, professional services, manufacturing, logistics, and financial services. Every engagement starts with a custom ICP build.

founderSupportingCards.title: Onboarding Timeline
founderSupportingCards.body_template: Most clients are live within 14 days. Week one is playbook build and rep briefing. Week two is outreach launch. {brand_short} targets first qualified conversations in week two or three.

founderSupportingCards.title: Reporting Cadence
founderSupportingCards.body_template: Weekly Monday reports: outreach volume, reply rate, meetings booked, pipeline value added. Shared live CRM dashboard for real-time visibility.
